parameters: {'id': 'TC-API-POSTS-003', 'title': 'POST /posts — create a new post', 'severity': 'CRITICAL', 'tags': ['smoke', 'regression', 'crud'], 'story': 'Post CRUD', 'level': 'API', 'endpoint': '/posts', 'method': 'POST', 'expected_status': 201, 'assert_type': 'create', 'payload': {'userId': 1, 'title': 'API Testing with pytest + requests', 'body': 'A showcase of REST API test automation using pytest, requests, and JSON Schema validation.
